summary: Rewrote tests/visual/shaderDisplacement.test.ts to match the exact US-041 acceptance test specifications (30 tests covering all acceptance criteria). The shader implementation (simplex noise FBM in vertex shaders, uDisplacementScale uniform wiring, layeredNoise removal) was already complete from prior work — noise3d.glsl provides snoise/fbm3, both pointWarp.vert.glsl and ribbonWarp.vert.glsl use them for sculptural displacement, and both pointCloud.ts and ribbonField.ts wire uDisplacementScale = motionAmplitude * structureComplexity. All 30 tests pass, build succeeds.
